creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
R.I.P. hps@, he should be under <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/contributors/#contrib-develinmemoriam>. 

Hans Petter Selasky, as his name currently appears at the page, or 
Hans Petter William Sirevåg Selasky, as below. 

CC gallatin@, author of <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-announce/2023-July/000076.html>. 

Thanks, and respect.
